Torus-Web: economy platform for TORUS ($TRS), pay-for-gaming. Stack: Next.js 15.5.2, TypeScript, MongoDB/Mongoose, shadcn/ui, Tailwind, Wagmi+Viem+AppKit, React Query, RHF+Zod, Framer Motion, Three.js, node-cron, JWT+CSRF. Root: /home/crab/torus-web/. Features: multi-chain wallet (ETH/Polygon/BSC/Arbitrum/Solana/Avalanche); Steam+rate limiting; UUID IDs; BABT/Galxe on-chain identity; daily/weekly/monthly rewards; cron (stats 60min, rankings hourly, rewards midnight/Sun/1st). Security: JWT 24h, CSRF, Steam key rotation. Build non-strict.

[chainovi/eclipse-agave #5] SDK 2.2.0 Solana program architecture patterns. lib.rs: declare_id!(), exports {error,instruction,processor,state,constants}, re-exports processor::Entrypoint. Cargo: crate-type=["lib"]; deps=borsh, serde+serde_derive, solana-bincode, solana-clock/instruction/pubkey, solana-program-runtime, thiserror, num-derive+num-traits, log. error.rs: derive Error+Debug+Clone+PartialEq+Eq+FromPrimitive+ToPrimitive, auto-incremented discriminants. instruction.rs: derive Debug+Clone+PartialEq+Eq+Serialize+Deserialize (bincode), no BorshSerialize needed. state.rs: derive BorshSerialize+BorshDeserialize+Debug+Clone; leading discriminator byte (0x4X); SERIALIZED_SIZE=1+borsh_body; serialize_into checks buf, prepends discriminator. Discriminators: Treasury=0x54, Governance=0x47/0x50/0x56. processor.rs: declare_process_instruction!(Name,DEFAULT_COMPUTE_UNITS,handler); limited_deserialize for instructions; handler=check_account_countâ†’signersâ†’ownershipâ†’discriminatorâ†’deserializeâ†’logicâ†’serializeâ†’ic_msg!. vote_weight.rs: compute_voting_power() reads byte offsets (amount@33 u64LE, vote_weight_bps@82 u16LE), u128 intermediate. Tests: state round-trip, instruction serialization, error discriminant stability, boundary cases.

[trading-framework #3] Architecture overview (Session 346). ENGINE LOOP: Engine.run()â†’CronScheduler(symbols,interval_seconds,candle_interval)â†’start(callback) polls every N secondsâ†’connector.get_candles(symbol,interval,limit=1)â†’callbackâ†’Engine._on_candle()â†’strategy.on_candle(symbol,candle)â†’Signalâ†’Executor.execute(signal). SCHEDULER: single impl, time.sleep() polling, fixed interval only, no cron expressions. CONNECTOR ABC (8 abstract methods): get_price, get_candles, submit_order, cancel_order, get_positions, get_balance, is_market_open; impls=PaperConnector+BinanceConnector(ccxt)+BaseConnector; all Decimal arithmetic. STRATEGY ABC: on_candle()â†’Signal|None; on_tick() optional; MACrossoverStrategy=SMA crossover per-symbol buffer. EXECUTOR: Signalâ†’Order(_signal_to_order)â†’GateRunner.run_all()â†’Submitâ†’Journalâ†’Notify; blocked=logged as warnings. PORTFOLIO: balance+positions via connector calls, no caching; total_value=cash+mark-to-market.

2026 Self-Improving Agent Framework Research â€” Top 5 patterns for Torus. (1) FOUR-PHASE FEEDBACK LOOP: Baselineâ†’Feedbackâ†’Meta-optimizationâ†’Validation; record tool failures into LanceDB as meta-prompts; Gate 6 blocksâ†’meta-observation; monthly clusterâ†’summarized guardrails. (2) DECISION-CENTRIC OBSERVABILITY (HIVE): log intent/options/choice/reasoning per hook; add to observation.py: decision_context={options,chosen_path,confidence,rationale}; Gates 1-3 emit PreToolUse decision logs. (3) CIRCUIT-BREAKER WITH ADAPTIVE THRESHOLDS: 3 quality failures/5minâ†’auto-pause skill; store in /run/user/1000/claude-hooks/state/circuit_breaker.json; tag circuit-breaker-triggered. (4) TRIANGULATED VERIFICATION: deterministic rule + LLM-as-judge + human judgment gate; skills/[name]/test_cases.json with success criteria; auto-run evals before skill deploy. (5) MULTI-DIMENSIONAL EVOLUTION: evolve tool presence, hook sequence, memory schema; monthly skill discovery scanner; store suggestions as discovery-recommendation observations. SOURCES: OpenAI Self-Evolving cookbook; HIVE (Aden HQ); GEA (UC Santa Barbara); Galileo 2025 actor-critic. STAGING: P1(wk1-2)=patterns 2+3; P2(wk3-5)=patterns 1+4; P3(wk6-8)=pattern 5+monthly compaction.

"}; clears voiceInput.value; stops/restarts recognition to reset sendOffset; refocuses terminal. WS FLOW: clientâ†’server.py ws_endpoint:252-255â†’pty_session.write(data)â†’os.write(master_fd,data.encode())â€”single atomic write, NOT char-by-char. CRITICAL: entire text+

Claude Code & MCP 2026 Research. HOOK EVENTS (17): SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit/PreToolUse/PermissionRequest/PostToolUse/PostToolUseFailure/Notification/SubagentStart/SubagentStop/Stop/TeammateIdle(new)/TaskCompleted(new)/ConfigChange(new)/WorktreeCreate(new)/WorktreeRemove(new)/PreCompact(new)/SessionEnd. Linux Speech-to-Text for Claude Code (research). TIER1 OFFLINE: nerd-dictation(VOSK)=single-file Python, ~1.5s cold start, --output=STDOUT, easy piping, lower accuracy; whisper.cpp=C++ <300ms startup, streaming 5-7x slower than real-time, better for file transcription; faster-whisper(CTranslate2)=30-40% faster RTF than whisper.cpp, 1.8s Python startup, best accuracy/speed. TIER2 CLI: voice2json=intent parsing built-in, JSONL output, 18 languages, not continuous; PocketSphinx=<100ms overhead, lower accuracy, needs training. TIER3 CLOUD: Deepgram=$0.0077/min streaming, <300ms latency; AssemblyAI=$0.0025/min base (cheapest). RECOMMENDATION: nerd-dictation with faster-whisper backendâ€”keyboard shortcuts+STDOUTâ†’faster-whisper engineâ†’pipe to Claude Code stdin; latency 2-3s/utterance; cost $0 offline. Alt if latency critical: Deepgram API+CLI wrapper (~$14/month at 1h/day).

Whisper STT Research (Feb 2026) for Claude Code voice integration. MODELS (6): tiny(39M,~1GB), base(74M), small(244M,~2GB), medium(769M,~5GB), large(1550M,~10GB), turbo(809M,~6GB,8x faster,no translation). PERFORMANCE: turbo=~8x faster than large; faster-whisper(CTranslate2)=4x faster than official+less memory; small CPU: ~466MB+~2GB RAM. PYTHON API: whisper.load_model("turbo"); model.transcribe("audio.mp3")â†’{text,segments(timestamps),language}. OFFICIAL: FILE-BASED ONLY, 30s sliding window, no streaming. REAL-TIME ALTERNATIVES: WhisperLive(collabora)=faster-whisper+VAD, client-server WebSocket, Docker, browser/iOS/CLI; whisper_streaming(ufal)=multiple backends; turbo-whisper=Linux dictation+waveform UI. STDIN PATTERN: sox recâ†’whisperâ†’xdotool/ydotool for Wayland. RECOMMENDED: faster-whisper libraryâ†’Python CLI (reads audio from stdin/temp)â†’JSON output to stdout; mic via pactl/sox; daemon mode piping to Claude Code stdin. INSTALL: pip install faster-whisper (official: pip install -U openai-whisper). CPU viable: faster-whisper+small model.
